proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x6: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { Option.some[CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != CategoryEquivalence.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3, x4, x5, x6) or x0.forward = x1 }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e, forward, backward, unit_fwd, unit_bwd, counit_fwd, counit_bwd)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x2: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x6: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { Option.some[CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3]](x0) != CategoryEquivalence.new[T0, T1, T2, T3](x1, x2, x3, x4, x5, x6) or x0.backward = x2 }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e, forward, backward, unit_fwd, unit_bwd, counit_fwd, counit_bwd)

goal: CategoryEquivalence.constraint[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x2: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { CategoryEquivalence.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) = is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0.forward, x0.backward, x0.unit_fwd, x0.unit_bwd, x0.counit_fwd, x0.counit_bwd) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x2: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { not is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) or CategoryEquivalence.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x2: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { CategoryEquivalence.constraint[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) = is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)
not CategoryEquivalence.constraint[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

goal: is_category_equivalence[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd) = (category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O1, M1](e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd) and category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O2, M2, O2, M2](e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1], x2: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x3: NaturalTransformation[T0, T1, T0, T1], x4: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3], x5: NaturalTransformation[T2, T3, T2, T3]) { (category_equivalence_cats_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T0, T1, T0, T1](x2, x3) and category_equivalence_counit_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x4) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[T2, T3, T2, T3](x4, x5)) = is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4, x5) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd, e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: CategoryEquivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3]) { is_category_equivalence[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0.forward, x0.backward, x0.unit_fwd, x0.unit_bwd, x0.counit_fwd, x0.counit_bwd) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e)

category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O1, M1](e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd) and category_equivalence_counit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.counit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O2, M2, O2, M2](e.counit_fwd, e.counit_bwd)

category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) and category_equivalence_unit_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward, e.unit_fwd) and is_natural_isomorphism_pair[O1, M1, O1, M1](e.unit_fwd, e.unit_bwd)

goal: category_equivalence_cats_axiom[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward) = (e.forward.src_cat = e.backward.dst_cat and e.forward.dst_cat = e.backward.src_cat)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: Functor[T0, T1, T2, T3], x1: Functor[T2, T3, T0, T1]) { (x0.src_cat = x1.dst_cat and x1.src_cat = x0.dst_cat) = category_equivalence_cats_axiom[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0, x1) }[O1, M1, O2, M2](e.forward, e.backward)
